violations.text: An allergy awareness statement was not observed provided for customer viewing. An allergy awareness statement was written and posted for customer viewing at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

The wall directly next to the service sink was observed to have exposed wall structure. Wall structure is to be enclosed with smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent wallboard/sealant. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2026

The basement stairwell and storage shelving area was observed to have an accumulation of debris and old droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean and to aid in the current pest control program. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2026

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed in need of repair... - The ceiling coating in the front area was observed to be cracking/peeling - The counter surface under the slicer and near hand sink is chipped/cracked - The sealed coating to the wood trim near the hand sink is worn and in need of resurfacing - The seams of the wall covering in the 3 bay sink area are separating The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Materials for durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent surfaces were discussed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026
